plugins.name: prodmaster-ai
plugins.description: Full-stack AI development operations for Claude Code. One command (/prodmasterai) orchestrates features, systematic QA with health scoring, two-pass code review, deployment pipelines, security audits (14-phase OWASP+STRIDE), performance benchmarking (Core Web Vitals), cross-model adversarial review, post-ship doc sync, and autonomous self-evolution. 20+ skills, all accessible from a single entry point.
